1.goal: Project kick-off: architecture defined and environment ready

2.goal: Raw data ingestion pipelines for all core data sources operational

3.goal: Remaining ingestion pipelines, security foundations and monitoring in place

4.goal: Silver (clean) layer and OLAP database built and populated

5.goal: All BI dashboards (PowerBI & SAC) delivered with security controls

6.goal: ML models, predictions, documentation, deployment and final presentation

1.want: Design the end-to-end high level architecture required for the project and select the tools
1.so_that: Understand, prepare and build the different components of the solution
1.ac: Architecture diagram created, describing the different tools, components, and flows to implement

tasks.desc: Identify all system components and data sources
Select tools for ingestion, storage, transformation and BI
Draw the end-to-end architecture diagram
Review architecture with the team
Finalize and document architecture decisions

2.want: Explore the available data, verify the access, connectivity and install the tools
2.ac: Connectivity is working and chosen tools are installed
2.notes: US02 - ADF pipelines operational, tools installed (Azure, Databricks, KeyVault)

tasks.desc: Request access credentials for all data sources
Verify connectivity to all data sources
Install and configure required tools (Azure, PowerBI, SAC, Knime, etc.)
Perform initial data exploration on all datasets
Document findings and confirm readiness

3.want: Build the adequate raw data storage area
3.so_that: Store all integrated data in the original format
3.ac: Data storage area created, with a defined folder structure
3.notes: US03 - Bronze ADLS layer used across all ingestion pipelines

tasks.desc: Define folder structure for raw storage (bronze layer)
Provision the raw storage area (Azure Blob / Data Lake)
Set access permissions on the raw storage
Validate the storage area is accessible by the team

4.want: Develop the data flow to ingest the solar panel data into the raw data store
4.so_that: Load the data into the data storage area
4.ac: Solar panel data is in the data storage area
4.notes: US04 - PL_Bronze_Solar.json pipeline with 4 activities deployed

tasks.desc: Analyse solar panel data source structure and format
Develop ingestion pipeline for solar panel data
Test pipeline with sample data
Validate data loaded correctly in raw storage

5.want: Develop the data flow to ingest the general power data into the raw data store
5.so_that: Load the data into the data storage area
5.ac: Power data is in the data storage area
5.notes: US05 - PL_Bronze_Conso.json pipeline with 4 activities deployed

tasks.desc: Analyse general power data source structure and format
Develop ingestion pipeline for general power data
Test pipeline with sample data
Validate data loaded correctly in raw storage

6.want: Develop the data flow to ingest the temperature/weather data into the raw data store
6.so_that: Load the data into the data storage area
6.ac: Weather (C°) is in the data storage area

tasks.desc: Analyse temperature/weather data source structure
Develop ingestion pipeline for temperature data
Test and validate data in raw storage

7.want: Develop the data flow to ingest the humidity/weather data into the raw data store
7.so_that: Load the data into the data storage area
7.ac: Weather (Hum.) data is in the data storage area

tasks.desc: Analyse humidity/weather data source structure
Develop ingestion pipeline for humidity data
Test and validate data in raw storage

8.want: Develop the data flow to ingest the rooms reservation data into the raw data store
8.so_that: Load the data into the data storage area
8.ac: Rooms data is in the data storage area
8.notes: US08 - PL_Bronze_Bookings.json with GDPR anonymisation step

tasks.desc: Analyse rooms reservation data source structure
Develop ingestion pipeline for rooms reservation data
Implement anonymisation of teacher names at ingestion
Test and validate data in raw storage

9.want: Develop the data flow to ingest the weather forecast data into the raw data store
9.so_that: Load the data into the data storage area
9.ac: Weather forecast data is in the data storage area
9.notes: US09 - Weather forecast CSVs (Pred_*.csv) in Meteo/Meteo2 folders

tasks.desc: Identify weather forecast API / data source
Develop ingestion pipeline for weather forecast data
Test and validate data in raw storage

10.want: Implement a secure way to store and manage the keys, pwd and certificates
10.so_that: Manage securely the keys, pwd and certificates
10.ac: Solution (process, tool) defined for the key/pwd/certificates
10.notes: US10 - LS_AKV.json Azure Key Vault linked service deployed

tasks.desc: Evaluate key management tools (Azure Key Vault, etc.)
Select and configure the chosen key management tool
Document the key/pwd/certificate management process
Communicate process to the team

11.want: Implement the integration and storage security (encryption, transport)
11.so_that: Ensure the security of the data
11.ac: Data in the storage area and during transport cannot be accessed without authorization
11.notes: US11 - TLS 1.2 enforced: LS_AzureSQL_Gold (encrypt:mandatory), SFTP SSH port 22, ADLS encryptedCredential, SHIR HTTPS relay. Documented in Tech Guide §3.2

tasks.desc: Define encryption requirements for data at rest
Implement encryption for data at rest in storage
Implement TLS/HTTPS for data in transit
Test and validate security measures

12.want: Implement error handling, monitoring and alerts for all data flows
12.so_that: Be notified, visualize, investigate and fix issues in the data integration
12.ac: Monitoring and alerts are created; no data is lost in case of issues
12.notes: US12 - Azure Monitor metric alert rule configured on ADF pipeline. Scheduling via TRG_Daily_0715.json with incremental filter (@addDays(utcnow(),-1))

tasks.desc: Define error handling strategy for all pipelines
Implement error handling and retry logic in each pipeline
Set up monitoring dashboards for pipeline runs
Configure alerts for pipeline failures
Test failure scenarios and validate alerts

13.want: Implement the scheduling in all data flows to retrieve the latest data (insert, update, merge, historize)
13.ac: Scheduling and upsert is created for all flows
13.notes: US13 - TRG_Daily_0715.json schedule trigger (runtimeState: Started) daily at 07:15 Note: historization (task 4) and end-to-end test (task 5) descoped or deferred.

tasks.desc: Define scheduling requirements for each pipeline
Implement scheduling triggers for all pipelines
Implement upsert / merge logic for incremental loads
Implement historization of previous records
Test scheduling and upsert end-to-end

14.want: Prepare mockups of the dashboards and reports
14.so_that: Agree with the product owner on the KPIs, visualization and purpose
14.ac: Mockups of the BI part are created

tasks.desc: Gather KPI requirements from product owner
Create wireframe mockups for solar panel dashboard
Create wireframe mockups for energy dashboard
Create wireframe mockups for rooms dashboard
Review and validate mockups with product owner

15.want: Build the adequate clean (silver) data storage area
15.so_that: Store the clean version of the data
15.notes: US15 - silver_transformation.py creates silver layer on ADLS

tasks.desc: Define folder/schema structure for silver (clean) storage
Provision the silver storage area
Set access permissions on the silver storage
Validate the silver storage area is accessible

16.want: Identify the possible data quality issues, and develop the flow to load data from raw to clean storage
16.ac: Data quality issues are identified and fixed; clean data files available
16.notes: US16 - silver_transformation.py handles DQ: UTF-16 decode, timestamp parsing, counter reset, anonymisation

tasks.desc: Profile data quality for each dataset (nulls, duplicates, formats)
Document identified data quality issues
Develop transformation and cleansing rules
Develop ETL flows from raw to silver for each dataset
Test and validate clean data in silver storage

17.want: Modelize the OLAP database to store the aggregated (gold) data
17.notes: US17 - star_schema_bellevue_v2.sql defines full OLAP star schema

tasks.desc: Identify all KPIs and metrics required for OLAP
Design the dimensional model (facts and dimensions)
Review the model with the team and product owner
Document the OLAP model

18.so_that: Build afterward the BI reports and dashboards
18.notes: US18 - star_schema_bellevue_v2.sql creates BellevueEnergyDW Azure SQL DB

tasks.desc: Provision the OLAP database (Azure Synapse / SQL DW)
Create fact and dimension tables based on the model
Implement indexes and partitioning for performance
Validate the database structure

19.want: Develop the data flow to load data from the silver storage into the OLAP database
19.so_that: Have data in the OLAP DB
19.notes: US19 - silver_gold_dimensions.py + silver_gold_facts.py + ADF Populate Dim/Fact Gold activities

tasks.desc: Develop ETL flows from silver storage to OLAP DB
Implement incremental load logic for OLAP
Test and validate data in OLAP DB

20.want: Implement data masking (anonymisation) for personal data
20.notes: US20 - silver_transformation.py: SHA-2 anonymisation of teacher names (GDPR)

tasks.desc: Identify all personal data fields across datasets
Implement masking/anonymisation rules for personal data
Test and validate masking is applied correctly

21.want: Build the solar panel production report/dashboard in PowerBI
21.so_that: Show the solar panel production data and compare inverters for optimization & maintenance
21.ac: Report/dashboard is created in PowerBI with energy production in KW, weather info, filters by inverter and date

tasks.desc: Connect PowerBI to OLAP DB / data source
Build solar panel production report page
Add energy production KPIs (KW, over time)
Add weather information overlay
Implement filters (inverter, date/time)
Review and publish dashboard

22.want: Build the energy report/dashboard in PowerBI
22.so_that: Show the energy related data to evaluate production, consumption and costs
22.ac: Report/dashboard is created in PowerBI with production/consumption in KWh and financial (CHF) value

tasks.desc: Build energy production vs consumption report page
Add KWh indicators over time
Add financial (CHF) value calculations
Implement filters and slicers
Review and publish dashboard

23.want: Build the rooms report/dashboard in PowerBI
23.so_that: Show the rooms data to identify bottlenecks, peak periods and usage patterns
23.ac: Report/dashboard is created in PowerBI with room occupation by room over time, filters by period and room

tasks.desc: Build rooms occupation report page
Add occupation by room and over time visuals
Implement filters (period, room)
Review and publish dashboard

24.want: Develop the data flow to export data and load into SAP SAC
24.ac: Data model is loaded in SAC

tasks.desc: Analyse SAP SAC data model requirements
Develop export flow from OLAP to SAC-compatible format
Load data model into SAC
Validate data in SAC

25.want: Build the solar panel failure report/dashboard in SAC
25.so_that: Show the solar panel failure data and identify common issues and faulty inverters
25.ac: Story is created in SAC with failures by type, over time, per inverter; filters by type, inverter and date

tasks.desc: Connect SAC to the data source / model
Build solar panel failure story in SAC
Add failure indicators by type, over time, per inverter
Implement filters (type, inverter, date/time)
Review and publish SAC story

26.so_that: Assign the correct access to the correct user
26.ac: 2 different user types (Technician, Director) created with appropriate access rights

tasks.desc: Define user roles and access matrix (Technician, Director)
Create user groups and assign roles in PowerBI / SAC
Test access rights for each user type
Document access management process

27.so_that: Ensure users have access only to the data they are supposed to see
27.ac: Directors can only see data for their respective school
27.notes: US27 - SQL RLS: BookingDivisionFilter policy ON, fn_division_security() created, ref_user_division_access table created. MISSING: table has no rows (no Director→Division mappings), CREATE ROLE/GRANT not done, Power BI roles & Azure AD assignments not configured.

tasks.desc: Define row level security rules (Director → school data)
Implement RLS in PowerBI / OLAP DB
Test RLS with different user accounts

28.want: Build a data flow to export/import the data to Knime
28.notes: US28 - ml_export_to_knime.py (Databricks) exports Silver→KNIME CSVs; ml_load_predictions.py imports predictions→Gold. ADF PL_ML_Prediction.json deployed. TRG_Daily_ML_0900 (runtimeState: Started, daily 09:00).

tasks.desc: Analyse Knime workflow requirements
Develop export flow to Knime-compatible format
Develop import flow from Knime results
Test and validate data exchange with Knime

29.want: Build a model to predict the energy production for the solar panels (considering weather forecast)
29.notes: US29 - KNIME workflow US29_Solar_Production_Prediction.knwf deployed (Random Forest, 100 trees, max_depth=10, ModelCode=PV_PROD_V1). Features: irradiance_wm2, temp_c, temporal. ml_generate_test_data.py for testing.

tasks.desc: Explore and prepare training data for energy production model
Select and justify ML algorithm for production prediction
Train energy production prediction model
Evaluate model performance (RMSE, MAE, R²)
Integrate weather forecast features into the model
Document model and results

30.want: Build a model to predict the energy consumption (considering weather forecast and room allocation)
30.notes: US30 - KNIME workflow US30_Consumption_Prediction.knwf deployed (Gradient Boosted Trees, 100 trees, lr=0.1, max_depth=5, ModelCode=CONS_V1). Features: temp_c, humidity_pct, precipitation, room_occupation_pct, temporal.

tasks.desc: Explore and prepare training data for energy consumption model
Select and justify ML algorithm for consumption prediction
Train energy consumption prediction model
Evaluate model performance (RMSE, MAE, R²)
Integrate weather forecast and room allocation features
Document model and results

31.want: Load back the results of the prediction into the data warehouse
31.so_that: Have the data in the Data Warehouse
31.notes: US31 - ml_load_predictions.py loads predictions into fact_energy_prediction (Azure SQL Gold), resolves DateKey/TimeKey/ModelKey FKs, backfills actuals via sp_backfill_prediction_actuals. vw_prediction_accuracy available for Power BI.

tasks.desc: Define schema for prediction results in DWH
Develop flow to load prediction results into DWH
Test and validate prediction data in DWH

32.want: Update the report/dashboard in PowerBI to visualize the prediction results
32.so_that: Show the prediction data in the reports
32.ac: Reports/dashboards are updated with prediction on power consumption & production

tasks.desc: Add prediction result pages to PowerBI reports
Visualize predicted vs actual production and consumption
Add confidence intervals / forecast ranges
Review and publish updated dashboards

33.want: Implement internationalization of the reports, dashboards and stories
33.so_that: Adapt solution to the end user language
33.ac: All stories, reports & dashboards can be shown in French, Spanish, Romanian & Portuguese

tasks.desc: Identify all text elements requiring translation
Implement language switching in PowerBI reports
Implement language switching in SAC stories
Validate translations in French, Spanish, Romanian, Portuguese

34.want: Verify the scalability of the solution and provide a forecast of required space & computational capabilities
34.so_that: Understand the operational requirements for the next months/year
34.ac: Forecasts of future requirements are created
34.notes: ?? ⚠️ Scope undefined — needs clarification before Sprint 6.

tasks.desc: Gather data volume and growth metrics
Analyse current resource utilisation
Model future growth scenarios
Produce scalability forecast report

35.want: Provide a written assessment of how the solution is compliant with GDPR and ethical principles
35.so_that: Ensure the solution is compliant with the laws
35.ac: Written assessment in line with GDPR Rules

tasks.desc: Identify all personal data processed by the solution
Map data flows and storage for GDPR assessment
Evaluate compliance with GDPR principles
Identify potential risks and mitigation measures
Write the GDPR compliance assessment document

36.want: Configure a package/transport to deploy to the customer environment
36.so_that: All work could be replicated in another instance and environment
36.ac: Deployment packages are created; deployment is repeatable and automated

tasks.desc: Define deployment strategy and target environments
Create infrastructure-as-code / deployment scripts
Package all components for deployment
Test deployment in a test environment
Document the deployment process

37.want: Generate user guide to facilitate the use of the dashboard and understanding of the data
37.so_that: Users can easily work with the solution
37.ac: User guide is created explaining each dashboard, filters, purpose and data refresh schedule
37.notes:
Dashboards / filters/ purpose per dashboard owner
Refresh schedule Dylan

tasks.desc: Define structure and scope of the user guide
Write user guide for solar panel dashboard
Write user guide for energy dashboard
Write user guide for rooms dashboard
Write user guide for SAC stories
Review and finalise user guide

38.want: Generate technical documentation to ensure another IT specialist can understand, maintain and enhance the solution
38.so_that: Another team can easily take over and continue the work
38.ac: Technical documentation covering architecture, storage, ETL, transformations, ML and dashboards

tasks.desc: Define structure and scope of technical documentation
Document overall architecture
Document storage/database structure, rules and security
Document ETL pipelines and data transformations
Document machine learning models
Document dashboards and reports
Review and finalise technical documentation

39.so_that: Present the results to the customer
39.ac: Presentation is well received by the customer

tasks.desc: Define presentation structure and storyline
Create presentation slides
Prepare demo of dashboards and ML results
Rehearse presentation with the team
Deliver final presentation
